title: What's new with data agents
summary: Google Cloud presented new data analytics agents with enhanced capabilities for data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The session covered the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, and IDEs like VSCode.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech walks through new data analytics agents aimed at data engineering, data science, and conversational analytics. The session details how the Agent Development Kit (ADK) and Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrate with these workflows. Key takeaways: the integrations are accessible through Gemini CLI, Claude Code, and Codex, and through IDEs including VSCode.
